_comment: Orange County Public Schools (OCPS) school + program index. Compiled from OCPS website (ocps.net), FLDOE MSID records, NCES data, and OCPS School Choice pages. OCPS is the 8th-largest district in the US with ~214 schools serving ~208,000 students. NEVER add student or unconsented staff PII here. Each record's verified date + source make provenance auditable. MSID numbers use 48XXXX placeholder format where actual FLDOE IDs could not be confirmed; these must be verified against the MSID file before reliance.

authority.note: MSID is canonical for school list + open/closed status; OCPS School Choice is canonical for magnet/choice programs. NCES District ID 1201440 covers 275 total school entries (includes programs, annexes, and inactive).

programs.note: Approved for conversion to STEAM charter in 2026
